##NAMES=Muirite
##RRUFFID=R150098
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ba_10_Ca_2_Mn^2+^TiSi_10_O_30_(OH,Cl,F)_10_
##LOCALITY=Esquire No. 7 mine, Big Creek, Fresno County, California, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=James Shigley
##DESCRIPTION=Isolated orange granular crystals, associated with quartz and sanbornite. Note that the c-cell edge is doubled relative to the literature
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R150098
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 13.946 b: 13.946 c: 11.208 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 2179.9 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
